tasks.title: NBC Friday Call Scenario Playbook
tasks.summary: Three scenarios (approved/conditional/declined) with talking points, next moves, key numbers, and emotional prep for the 10 AM PT credit committee decision call with Nick. Closing deadline April 8 (19 days).

tasks.title: MRC Post-Conference Week 1 Action Tracker
tasks.summary: 18 action items across 5 owners consolidated from MRC debrief. #1 urgent: Kount DSA redlines (Jeff Pauletto, ship Friday). #2: Top 10 merchant target list for Checkout.com co-sell (Jim Cho by Monday). Full accountability cadence defined.

tasks.title: Forter Flip — Riskified Target Merchant List (Top 15)
tasks.summary: 15 confirmed Riskified customers ranked by RTN value and GMV. Top 10 approach list ready for Paul Finley to present to Browse at Forter. Tier 1: Wayfair, Shein, Booking.com. Includes pitch framework and risk flags (Riskified potential sale).

lastSummary: Overnight Mar 19-20: Three high-impact deliverables. (1) NBC call playbook for tomorrow's 10 AM credit decision — all scenarios covered. (2) MRC action tracker with 18 items, 5 owners, clear deadlines — Kount redlines are priority #1 for Friday. (3) Forter Flip target list — 15 Riskified merchants researched and ranked, ready for Paul Finley's approach to Browse.
